case_title: RUVINA CORTEZ BROWN VS. DARRELL D BROWN

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO FAMILY LAW TRIAL/ SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO TERMINATE RESTRAINING ORDERS FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED BROWN, RUVINA CORTEZ (PP) HEARING SET FOR DEC-26-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 404

G ISABELL AND GABRIELLA BROWN, SCHOOL, AND CHILD CARE. PET MAY RECORD PROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS MADE BY RESTRAINED PARTY.  PET AWARDED SOLE L/C AND
